member.name: T:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for configuring font resolvers in an IServiceCollection.
member.remarks: These extension methods enable registration of custom font resolvers for dependency injection scenarios. Use these methods to add font resolution capabilities to services in your application's DI container.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddFolderFontResolver(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String)
member.summary: Registers a font resolver that loads fonts from the specified folder into the service collection.
member.remarks: Use this method to enable font resolution from a custom folder when rendering documents or graphics. The registered font resolver will provide fonts from the specified directory for dependent services.
member.param: The service collection to which the font resolver will be added.
The file system path to the folder containing font files. Cannot be null or empty.
member.returns: The updated service collection with the folder font resolver registered.

member.name: T:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontFaceEntry
member.summary: Represents a font face entry, including its name, file path, and style information.
member.remarks: Use this class to describe a specific font face for font management or rendering operations. Each instance provides the identifying name, the location of the font file, and the associated style.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontFaceEntry.#ctor(System.String,System.String,PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontStyleKind)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the FontFaceEntry class with the specified font face name, file path, and style.
member.param: The name of the font face to associate with this entry. Cannot be null or empty.
The file system path to the font file. Must be a valid, accessible path.
The style of the font face, such as regular, bold, or italic.

member.name: P:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontFaceEntry.FaceName
member.summary: Gets the name of the font face used by the object.

member.name: P:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontFaceEntry.Path
member.summary: Gets the file system path associated with the current instance.

member.name: P:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontFaceEntry.Style
member.summary: Gets the font style applied to the text element.

member.name: T:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontFamilyEntry
member.summary: Represents a font family and its associated font face entries for different styles such as regular, bold, italic, and bold italic.
member.remarks: Use this class to group related font faces under a common display family name. Each style property can be set to a specific font face entry, allowing for flexible font management in applications that require multiple font styles.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontFamilyEntry.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the FontFamilyEntry class with the specified display family name.
member.param: The name used to display the font family. Cannot be null or empty.

member.name: P:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontFamilyEntry.DisplayFamilyName
member.summary: Gets the display-friendly family name associated with the entity.

member.name: P:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontFamilyEntry.Regular
member.summary: Gets or sets the font face entry representing the regular style.

member.name: P:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontFamilyEntry.Bold
member.summary: Gets or sets the font face entry used for bold text.

member.name: P:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontFamilyEntry.Italic
member.summary: Gets or sets the font face entry representing the italic style.

member.name: P:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontFamilyEntry.BoldItalic
member.summary: Gets or sets the font face entry representing the bold italic style.

member.name: T:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontStyleKind
member.summary: Specifies the available font style options for text rendering.
member.remarks: Use this enumeration to indicate the desired style when displaying or formatting text. The values represent common typographic styles and can be used to control appearance in UI elements or document generation.

member.name: F:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontStyleKind.Regular
member.summary: Represents the regular mode or default option in the enumeration.

member.name: F:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontStyleKind.Bold
member.summary: Specifies that text is displayed in a bold font style.

member.name: F:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontStyleKind.Italic
member.summary: Specifies that text is displayed in an italic style.

member.name: F:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontStyleKind.BoldItalic
member.summary: Specifies that both bold and italic formatting are applied.

member.name: T:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.ParsedFontFile
member.summary: Represents a parsed font file, including its file path, font family name, and style information.
member.remarks: Use this class to access metadata about a font file after it has been parsed. The properties provide read-only access to the file's location, family name, and style, which can be used for font selection or rendering operations.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.ParsedFontFile.#ctor(System.String,System.String,PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontStyleKind)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ParsedFontFile class with the specified font file path, family name, and style.
member.param: The file system path to the font file. Cannot be null or empty.
The name of the font family represented by the font file. Cannot be null or empty.
The style of the font, such as regular, bold, or italic.

member.name: P:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.ParsedFontFile.Path
member.summary: Gets the file system path associated with the current instance.

member.name: P:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.ParsedFontFile.FamilyName
member.summary: Gets the family name associated with the entity.

member.name: P:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.ParsedFontFile.Style
member.summary: Gets the font style applied to the text.

member.name: T:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontResolver
member.summary: Provides font resolution services by loading font files from a specified folder and enabling lookup of font faces and families for rendering purposes.
member.remarks: FontResolver supports TrueType (.ttf) and OpenType (.otf) font files located in the given directory and its subdirectories. It allows resolving font faces based on family name and style (bold, italic, etc.), and retrieving font file data for use in rendering or embedding scenarios. Thread safety is not guaranteed; callers should ensure appropriate synchronization if accessing instances concurrently.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontResolver.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the FontResolver class using the specified font folder.
member.remarks: The constructor loads font files from the provided folder and prepares internal mappings for font resolution. The folder must exist and contain valid font files for correct operation.
member.param: The path to the folder containing font files to be loaded. Cannot be null, empty, or whitespace.
member.exception: Thrown if fontFolder is null, empty, or consists only of whitespace.
Thrown if the specified font folder does not exist.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontResolver.ResolveTypeface(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Resolves a typeface for the specified font family and style attributes.
member.remarks: If the exact style requested is not available, the method may simulate bold or italic styles as needed. The returned FontResolverInfo indicates whether style simulation is required.
member.param: The name of the font family to resolve. Cannot be null, empty, or whitespace.
A value indicating whether the resolved typeface should be bold.
A value indicating whether the resolved typeface should be italic.
member.returns: A FontResolverInfo instance representing the resolved typeface and any required style simulation; or null if the family or style cannot be resolved.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontResolver.GetFont(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves the font file data for the specified font face name.
member.remarks: If the specified font face name does not exist or the corresponding file is not found, the method returns an empty array. The caller should check the returned array's length to determine if valid font data was retrieved.
member.param: The name of the font face to retrieve. Cannot be null, empty, or whitespace.
member.returns: A byte array containing the font file data if the font face exists and the file is found; otherwise, an empty array.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontResolver.LoadFonts(System.String)
member.summary: Loads font files from the specified directory and updates the internal font family and face collections.
member.remarks: This method scans the directory recursively for TrueType (.ttf) and OpenType (.otf) font files. Existing font families and faces are updated or added based on the discovered files. If multiple files for the same style are found, only the first is used.
member.param: The path to the directory containing font files. Must not be null or empty. All .ttf and .otf files in this directory and its subdirectories will be processed.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontResolver.BuildFaceName(System.String,PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontStyleKind)
member.summary: Builds a font face name by combining the specified font family name with a style suffix.
member.remarks: The returned face name follows the convention: family name plus a suffix indicating the style (e.g., "#B" for bold). If an unrecognized style is provided, the regular style suffix is used.
member.param: The name of the font family to use as the base for the face name. Cannot be null or empty.
The font style to apply. Determines the suffix appended to the family name.
member.returns: A string representing the font face name, consisting of the family name and a style-specific suffix.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontResolver.ParseFontFile(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a font file path to extract the font family name and style information.
member.remarks: This method infers font style (such as bold or italic) and family name based on the file name conventions. Explicit 'Regular' tokens are ignored when determining style.
member.param: The full path to the font file to be parsed. Cannot be null or empty.
member.returns: A ParsedFontFile instance containing the extracted font family name and style information from the specified file path.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontResolver.GetStyle(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Determines the font style based on bold and italic flags.
member.param: A value indicating whether the font should be bold. Set to to apply bold styling; otherwise, .
A value indicating whether the font should be italic. Set to to apply italic styling; otherwise, .
member.returns: A value representing the combined font style. Returns if both bold and italic are specified; otherwise, returns , , or as appropriate.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontResolver.IsBoldToken(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified token represents a bold font weight.
member.remarks: The method recognizes common font weight names such as "bold", "semibold", "demibold", "extrabold", "ultrabold", "black", "heavy", and "medium" as bold weights.
member.param: The font weight token to evaluate. Cannot be null.
member.returns: true if the token corresponds to a recognized bold font weight; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontResolver.IsItalicToken(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified token represents an italic font style.
member.param: The font style token to evaluate. Must not be null.
member.returns: true if the token is "italic" or "oblique"; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontResolver.IsRegularToken(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified token represents a regular font style.
member.remarks: The method recognizes "regular", "normal", "roman", and "book" as regular font style tokens. Token comparison is case-sensitive.
member.param: The token to evaluate. Must be a non-null, non-empty string representing a font style.
member.returns: true if the token matches a regular font style; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontResolver.NormalizeFamilyKey(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a normalized version of the specified family key, containing only lowercase alphanumeric characters.
member.remarks: Normalization removes all non-alphanumeric characters and converts all letters to lowercase. This method is useful for standardizing keys for comparison or storage.
member.param: The input string representing the family key to normalize. Cannot be null.
member.returns: A string containing only the lowercase letters and digits from the input. If the input contains no alphanumeric characters, returns an empty string.

member.name: M:PdfDocuments.FontResolver.Folder.FontResolver.NormalizeToken(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes the specified token by removing non-alphanumeric characters and converting all letters to lowercase.
member.remarks: Normalization is case-insensitive and excludes any characters that are not letters or digits. This method does not modify the original string.
member.param: The string token to normalize. Cannot be null.
member.returns: A new string containing only the lowercase alphanumeric characters from the input token. Returns an empty string if no alphanumeric characters are present.
